description: Header record for every customer invoice. One row per invoice. Line items stored in INV1.

joins.purpose: Get all line items — products, quantities, prices, taxes
Get customer name, address, payment terms
Get salesman name for commission and territory reports
Get project name for project-wise revenue reporting
Get cost centre / branch for department-wise revenue split
Get TDS / withholding tax lines deducted on this invoice
Get freight, handling, and other additional charges on invoice

columns.description: Unique system-generated key. FK target in INV1, INV2, INV3.
Sequential user-facing number printed on invoice.
Current lifecycle status of the invoice.
Y if this invoice has been cancelled.
Business partner code. Links to OCRD master.
Customer name copied from OCRD at posting time.
Date the invoice was created / posted.
Date by which payment is expected. Drives AR aging.
Date used for tax (GST) reporting period.
Total invoice amount including VAT/GST, in document currency.
Total invoice amount in foreign currency.
Total in local / system currency (INR for Indian companies).
Total tax (GST/VAT) amount on this invoice.
Total discount given on this invoice.
Total amount received against this invoice so far.
Remaining unpaid balance. Used for AR outstanding reports.
Remaining unpaid balance in foreign currency.
Currency code in which the invoice was raised.
Exchange rate used between document currency and system currency.
Cost centre or branch code. FK to OOCR.
Payment terms group assigned to this invoice.
Fiscal period in which this invoice is posted.
Linked journal entry in OJDT created on posting.
Date this record was last modified.

description: Each row is one line item on a sales invoice. FK to OINV via DocEntry.

joins.purpose: Get invoice header — customer, date, totals, status
Get item name, group, unit of measure, item type
Get warehouse name from which goods were dispatched
Get salesman assigned at line level

columns.description: FK to OINV.DocEntry — links line to its invoice header.
Sequential line number within the invoice (0-based).
Item sold on this line. FK to OITM.
Item description copied from OITM at posting (can be overridden).
Quantity of the item sold on this line.
Price per unit in document currency, before discount and tax.
Quantity × Price after discount, before tax.
Tax code applied to this line (e.g. GST18, IGST5).
Tax amount calculated for this line.
Warehouse from which this item was shipped. FK to OWHS.
Salesman responsible for this line. FK to OSLP.
DocEntry of the originating delivery or order.
Line number in the originating document.
Distribution rule / cost centre at line level. FK to OOCR.

description: Additional charges (freight, handling, insurance) applied to a sales invoice.

joins.purpose: Link freight charge to its parent invoice

columns.description: Sequential line number for this charge.
Code identifying the type of charge (freight, handling etc.).
Tax code applied to this charge.

description: TDS / withholding tax lines deducted on each sales invoice.

joins.purpose: Link TDS line to its parent invoice

columns.description: Amount of TDS withheld on this line.
Amount on which TDS is calculated.

description: Header for all customer sales orders. Tracks ordered quantities, delivery dates, and order status.

joins.purpose: Get ordered products, quantities, delivery dates per line
Get customer name, shipping address, payment terms
Get salesman responsible for this order
Get project details for project-based orders

columns.description: Unique system key for this order. FK target in RDR1.
Current status of the sales order.
Customer account code. FK to OCRD.
Customer name at time of order creation.
Requested delivery date for the order.
Value of items not yet delivered or invoiced.
Currency in which the order was placed.

description: Each row is one product line on a sales order. Tracks ordered qty, delivered qty, invoiced qty.

joins.purpose: Get order header — customer, date, status
Get product name, group, UOM
Get warehouse from which goods will be dispatched

columns.description: Sequential line number within the order.
Product ordered on this line. FK to OITM.
Total quantity ordered on this line.
Remaining quantity not yet delivered or invoiced.
Price per unit agreed for this order line.
Total value of this line before tax.
Warehouse to dispatch from. FK to OWHS.
Date committed for shipping this line.

description: Delivery / dispatch note header. Records goods physically dispatched to customers. Known as challan in India.

joins.purpose: Get items and quantities physically dispatched
Get customer name and delivery address
Get salesman who owns this delivery

columns.description: Unique system key. FK target in DLN1.
Customer name at time of delivery.
Remarks — often used for vehicle / LR number in India.

description: Each row is one product line on a delivery note. Records actual quantities dispatched.

joins.purpose: Get delivery header — customer, date, challan number
Get item name and unit of measure
Get warehouse from which goods were dispatched

columns.description: Price per unit for this delivery line.
Total value of this delivery line.

description: Quotation sent to a customer before receiving an order. Precedes Sales Order in document chain.

joins.purpose: Get quoted products, quantities, and prices
Get customer name and contact for this quote
Get salesman who raised this quotation

columns.description: Unique system key. FK target in QUT1.

description: Line items on a sales quotation — products, quantities, quoted prices.

joins.purpose: Get quotation header details
Get product details

columns.description: Total value for this quoted line.

description: Credit note issued to a customer to reverse or reduce a sales invoice. Reduces AR balance.

joins.purpose: Get returned/credited items and amounts
Get customer details for the credit note
Link credit memo back to the original invoice

columns.description: Unique system key. FK target in RIN1.
Customer name at time of credit note.
Date the credit note was issued.
DocEntry of the original invoice being credited.

description: Line items on a sales credit memo — items returned or credited to the customer.

joins.purpose: Get credit memo header
Get item details

columns.description: Total credit amount for this line.

description: Records goods returned by customers. Reverses a delivery. Returns stock to warehouse.

joins.purpose: Get returned items and quantities
Get customer who returned the goods

columns.description: Unique system key. FK target in RDN1.

description: Line items on a sales return document.

joins.purpose: Get return header details
Get item details
Get warehouse stock was returned to

columns.description: Price per unit at time of return.
Total value of this return line.
